## Meeting Purpose

[Explore AI-assisted content creation for Hims' SEO strategy, focusing on efficiency gains in publishing new pages while maintaining quality and regulatory compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hims is looking to accelerate content production for programmatic SEO initiatives, potentially involving hundreds of thousands of pages](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a hybrid AI-human workflow for content creation, with customizable processes and quality controls](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Key areas of interest for Hims include drug comparison pages and location-based "near me" pages for health specialists](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Regulatory compliance and legal approval remain important considerations for Hims in adopting AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Strategy at Hims

  - [Traditional focus on blog content and storefront pages](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Recent expansion into tools, calculators, and drug-related landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Seeking to shorten time-to-publish for new pages significantly](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Exploring efficiency gains while maintaining quality content and brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Assisted Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes complex workflows with over 100 steps](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Incorporates custom researchers and knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach with experienced managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Post-processing for brand voice adaptation and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Fact-checking and legal review integration possible](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Estimated 80% AI workflow, 20% human involvement (varies by project)](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Potential Use Cases for Hims

  - [Drug comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - ["Near me" pages for doctors or health specialists by location](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Possibility of leveraging public data on doctors and specialties](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Consideration of pharmacy-related content (similar to GoodRx model)](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### Integration and Scalability

  - [GrowthX can integrate with Contentful (Hims' CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Ability to scale up content production rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Option for iterative approach: start with "good" content, then enrich based on performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Potential to automate CTA placement, conversion modules, and analytics integration](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### Pricing and Workflow Structure

  - [Programmatic content typically priced at $9,000/month per workstream](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [One workstream produces about 1,200 pages annually](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Editorial content priced at 10-20 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Workstream includes dedicated managing editor and writer team](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hims team to internally discuss desired volume, project timeline, and specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Potential follow-up demo with Mike (SEO team lead)](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a customized proposal based on Hims' requirements](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Explore potential in-person meeting in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/emF29VP5p5a9kqPRA4Ry43jzvGh5NAET?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
